paper_title: Cross Bedding and Sedimentation Analysis in Middle Siwalik Sandstones

methods.description: Process for collecting cross bedding measurements from various outcrops to analyze sedimentation patterns.

steps.description: 11 localities were visited at random and a total of 130 measurements were recorded.
steps.searchable_summary: collect cross bedding measurements from 11 localities

steps.description: In the cross bedded strata, the dip, strike, and thickness of the foreset laminae are recorded.
steps.searchable_summary: record dip, strike, and thickness of foreset laminae

steps.description: Adjustment of cross beds to compensate for regional dip was made wherever necessary.
steps.searchable_summary: adjust cross beds for regional dip

methods.description: Statistical procedures used to analyze circularly distributed directional data like cross bedding azimuth using von Mises distribution.

steps.description: The azimuth data may be approximated by von Mises distribution.
steps.searchable_summary: approximate azimuth data using von Mises distribution

steps.description: Calculate descriptive measures of azimuthal distribution of cross bedding foreset.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate descriptive measures for azimuthal distribution

steps.description: Use Batschelet's equations to calculate circular standard deviation and variance.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate circular standard deviation and variance using Batschelet's equations

methods.description: Analysis of sedimentation patterns and paleocurrent vectors to infer depositional environments and river characteristics.

steps.description: Computed values of magnitude of resultant exceed the critical value for Rayleigh's test for the presence of a preferred trend.
steps.searchable_summary: perform Rayleigh's test on resultant magnitude values

steps.description: Suggest the statistical significance of paleocurrent vectors and paleoflow trends.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze paleocurrent vectors for statistical significance

steps.description: Estimate paleochannel attributes and infer channel pattern of the depositing river.
steps.searchable_summary: estimate paleochannel attributes and infer river channel pattern
